metadata.description: Plan-first workflows for Cursor Teams. Ships flow-next: zero-dep, spec-driven SDLC with durable specs, re-anchored workers, and cross-model review.

plugins.name: flow-next
plugins.description: Zero-dependency, spec-driven agentic SDLC: durable specs, context-fit plans, re-anchored workers, adversarial cross-model review, and receipts. (Ralph autonomous mode is available on other hosts; intentionally not registered on Cursor.)
